raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a formal complaint against BarclaysXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for XXXX my billing dispute ( Case ID : XXXX ) regarding a {$270.00} charge from merchant XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ... p. XXXX ). 

Barclays closed the case because I did not respond to a XXXX merchant rebuttal notice. However, due to an incorrect billing address on file, I never received this physical letter. 

I possess conclusive proof of a fully completed return that customer service refuses to manually review or accept. I requested a return on XX/XX/year>, and the merchant provided the return address on XX/XX/year> ( XXXX ... p. XXXX ). I shipped the merchandise back on XX/XX/year>, within the merchant 's XXXX return window ( XXXX ... pp. XXXX ). 

According to XXXX Tracking # XXXX, the package was successfully delivered directly to the XXXX XXXX XXXX Department in XXXX, FL, on XX/XX/year> ( XXXX ... pp. XXXX, XXXX ). The merchant has been in possession of the returned merchandise since XX/XX/XXXX, but has ignored multiple follow-up emails regarding my refund ( XXXX ... pp. XXXX ). Barclays ' refusal to reopen this dispute and accept my tracking logs violates my consumer rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). I request that Barclays escalate this file to an executive team, review my evidence, and manually credit my account.
